calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-15-2009 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-15-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Francisco Torres, Esq. for plaintiff Caritas Management Corporation with property manager, Rachel Waters present.
Matthew Wood, Esq. appearing on limited scope representation for defendant Blanca Linares.

This cause comes on regularly for settlement conference. Settlement discussions held. Case settled. Parties enter into a signed Settlement Agreement and Stipulation for Entry of Judgment or Dismissal, which is then filed. Settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for premises located at 670 Natoma Street, #215, San Francisco, CA.
Trial date vacated.

JTP: Amanda Ebey, Clerk Clark Banayad, not reported (218)
